messages.subject: Verizon Digital Ready — TTI Registration Confirmation Request
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), an AI automation company based in South Central Los Angeles (EIN: 32-0663781).

I am registering for the Verizon Digital Ready program to complete the required courses and apply for the LISC Small Business Grant.

Business Details:
- Business Name: Total Transformation Inc.
- EIN: 32-0663781
- Address: 877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011
- Phone: (747) 301-8586
- Email: ceomrreddix@gmail.com
- Industry: AI Automation & Technology Services
- Years in Business: 2+
- Employees: Under 10

Please confirm registration and advise on the fastest path to complete the two required courses and submit the grant application.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO - Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586

messages.subject: AI Grant Accelerator Application — Total Transformation Inc. — $250K Request
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), applying for the AI Grant Accelerator program.

COMPANY OVERVIEW:
- Company: Total Transformation Inc.
- EIN: 32-0663781
- Founded: 2022
- Location: 877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011
- CEO: Aaron T. Reddix
- Contact: (747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com

AI MISSION:
TTI has built an autonomous AI revenue machine that deploys voice agents, appointment setters, and lead qualification systems for businesses across 18 verticals. Our AI runs 24/7 with no human intervention, responding to leads in under 60 seconds and converting at 3-5x industry average.

GRANT USE ($250,000):
- $100K: Scale AI infrastructure to support 500+ concurrent business clients
- $75K: Develop veteran housing AI management system for 100+ units in LA
- $50K: AI workforce development training for South Central LA residents
- $25K: Marketing and sales automation to reach $1M ARR within 12 months

IMPACT:
- 100+ homeless veterans housed in Los Angeles within 24 months
- 500+ businesses automated, creating economic efficiency across LA
- 50+ South Central LA residents trained in AI skills and placed in tech jobs

I welcome the opportunity to present a full pitch deck and demo.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO - Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com

messages.subject: Hivers & Strivers Investment Application — Total Transformation Inc. — Veteran-Founded AI Company
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO and founder of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), a veteran-founded AI automation company based in Los Angeles, CA.

TTI is applying for seed investment from Hivers & Strivers Capital.

COMPANY SNAPSHOT:
- Company: Total Transformation Inc.
- Founded: 2022 | Los Angeles, CA
- EIN: 32-0663781
- Founder: Aaron T. Reddix (Veteran)
- Revenue Model: $2,500 setup + $997/mo white-label AI automation
- Current MRR: Growing — 10 active clients in pipeline
- Target: $1M ARR in 12 months | $1B valuation in 36 months

THE PROBLEM:
Small and medium businesses lose 70% of their leads because they cannot respond fast enough. The average response time is 4 hours. The conversion window is 5 minutes.

THE SOLUTION:
TTI deploys AI voice agents and appointment setters that respond to every lead in under 60 seconds, 24/7, with no human required. White-labeled under the client's brand.

TRACTION:
- 65+ outbound prospects contacted in first campaign cycle
- 5 hot pipeline deals in progress ($347,500 potential value)
- Live website, Revenue OS product, and autonomous campaign machine deployed
- Veteran housing mission: 100+ veterans to be housed in LA within 24 months

INVESTMENT ASK: Seed round — $250,000 for 10% equity

I would welcome a 30-minute call to present the full pitch deck and demo.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO - Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011
